citations.description: docs/ directory listing shows no attestation-lifecycle.md or equivalent file
Currency rule + invalidation + re-gate guidance exists here as a section, not a standalone page
Agent section of docs index lists plan-review-gate.md but no attestation-lifecycle page

findings.criterion: a docs/ attestation-lifecycle page states the boolean currency rule + what invalidates + re-gate guidance
findings.detail: No dedicated docs/attestation-lifecycle page (or equivalent standalone file) exists in the repository. The docs/ directory listing and the docs/README.md index contain no such page. The boolean currency rule, invalidation conditions, and re-gate guidance ARE present in docs/plan-review-gate.md (lines 394–421 — the 'Checking currency cheaply' section), but the AC explicitly requires 'a docs/ attestation-lifecycle page', which implies a dedicated document; no such dedicated file was created.
findings.remediation: Create a dedicated docs/attestation-lifecycle.md (or similar named standalone page) that states: the boolean currency rule (all conditions that must hold), what invalidates an attestation on each axis, and re-gate guidance (run review-plan when --status is not certified). Register it in docs/README.md.

data.remediation: How to resolve the unmet criteria: for each one, decide whether the work is genuinely incomplete or simply undocumented. If a requirement is already satisfied but the proof is not discoverable from the code alone, add a comment to this ticket that documents the evidence — cite the concrete artifacts that meet the requirement (file paths and line ranges, commands and their output, links, or the reasoning that ties the work to the criterion). The completion verifier reads this ticket's comments, so evidence you record there is taken into account on the next verification. For any criterion whose work is genuinely unfinished, complete it, then re-verify.
